source: Account Opening: Required Documents, Index Codes & Identification Requirements
notes: Pershing forms are marked pershingForm: true (asterisked in source). Off-platform accounts substitute sponsor paperwork for Pershing forms.

categories.end_client: Documents provided by the end investor or account owner — IDs, legal documents, court orders, death certificates, entity formation docs, etc.
categories.custodian: Pershing-issued forms required for on-platform accounts (marked * in source document). Not required for off-platform accounts.
categories.firm: Park Avenue Securities (PAS) / IBD advisory firm forms
categories.sponsor: Third-party investment product sponsor paperwork, used for off-platform accounts in place of Pershing forms
categories.government: IRS or other government-issued forms obtained directly from the issuing agency

GOVT_ID.name: Government Issued ID
GOVT_ID.notes: ID name and address must match account title. Copy must be uploaded with new account paperwork. Additional identification may be requested if client cannot be identified by standard methods.

TODI.name: Individual Transfer on Death Account Agreement

TODJ.name: Joint Transfer on Death Account Agreement

ADOP.name: IRA Adoption Agreement
ADOP.notes: Shared index code used for Traditional, Roth, SEP, SIMPLE, Inherited, Inherited Roth, and Guardian IRA accounts. Specific adoption agreement variant corresponds to account type.

IRS_5304.name: IRS 5304 SIMPLE Form
IRS_5304.notes: Not available on GOL. Must be obtained from the IRS website or through a NetX360+ account.

DEAC.name: Death Certificate
DEAC.notes: Required when transferring assets from a decedent.

COUR_GUARDIANSHIP.name: Court Documents Establishing Guardianship
COUR_GUARDIANSHIP.notes: Required when guardian is not the parent.

BDCRTT.name: Certification of Testamentary Trust
BDCRTT.notes: Required for Testamentary Trust accounts only.

CAPTIVE_CERT.name: Captive Insurance Company Series Investment Account Certification & Indemnification

QRPA.name: Employee Data Form for Qualified Plans

SPRP.name: Single Participant Retirement Plan Certification
SPRP.notes: Required for Advisory accounts only (or Matson TAMP accounts for Third Party Custodian).

RETPLNAMD.name: CID Document Amendment (Revised Client Information Disclosures Document Amendment)

529A.name: Pershing 529 Application
529A.notes: Not asterisked in source but Pershing-issued form for on-platform 529 accounts.

BDSIS.name: Statement of Investment Selection (SIS)
BDSIS.notes: NetX360+ e-Sign eligible when using Envestnet integration.

BDCGDL.name: Change of Dealer Authorization
BDCGDL.notes: A Letter of Authorization (LOA) is acceptable in place of this form.

TFRR.name: Account Transfer Form
TFRR.notes: NetX360+ e-Sign eligible for ACAT transfers only. Client Statement not needed for ACAT transfers.

BANK_DOCS.name: Bank Documentation
BANK_DOCS.notes: May be required at Pershing's discretion when setting up ACH standing instructions.

PROC.name: Corestone Agreement
PROC.notes: NetX360+ e-Sign eligible for electronic checks only.

BDADVSOF.name: Advisory Program Source of Funds Form

ATTY.name: Power of Attorney Affidavit
ATTY.notes: Required when Legal POA document is older than 3 years. A new POA Affidavit is required every 3 years.

POA_LEGAL.name: Legal Power of Attorney Document
POA_LEGAL.notes: If dated within 3 years: sufficient on its own. If older than 3 years: must be accompanied by POA Affidavit (ATTY). Government Issued ID must also be uploaded.

POA_PERSHING.name: Pershing Durable Power of Attorney, Agreement and Indemnification
POA_PERSHING.notes: Must be signed by Account Owner and POA Agent with Notary. Option 3 alternative to providing a Legal POA document.

NAME_PROOF.name: Proof of Name Change
NAME_PROOF.notes: Government Issued ID must also be uploaded.

NAME_LOA.name: Client Letter of Authorization — Name Change

CGBLK.name: Change of RR — Block Transfer Request
CGBLK.notes: Only required for single change via edit Profile screen. Bulk updates done through Account Services by ACO do not require this form.

ANCFRM.name: Annuity Application and Supporting Docs
ANCFRM.notes: Refer to Annuity Carrier Electronic Signature Availability resource for e-Sign eligibility by carrier.

ANBDSFM.name: IBD Suitability Forms — EOI and Suitability Questionnaire

BDRQTEXC.name: Request to Exchange Investments (Switch Letters)
BDRQTEXC.notes: Does not go for approval but required to be on file. When scanning, select 'Submit for Review'.

_allPersonalAccounts.label: All Personal Accounts (applied in addition to registration-specific documents)
_allPersonalAccounts.notes: Review ID recommendations for each registration. ID name and address MUST match account title.

simple5304IRA.label: SIMPLE 5304 IRA
simple5304IRA.notes: Not eligible for e-Sign. IRS 5304 SIMPLE Form not available on GOL.

inheritedIRA.label: Inherited IRA
inheritedIRA.notes: Death Certificate required when transferring assets from the decedent.

inheritedRothIRA.label: Inherited Roth IRA
inheritedRothIRA.notes: Death Certificate required when transferring assets from the decedent.

guardianIRA.label: Guardian IRA
guardianIRA.notes: Court documents required when guardian is not the parent. Identification documentation for the guardian is required.

utmaUgma.label: UTMA / UGMA
utmaUgma.notes: Government Issued ID required for former minor once they reach the age of maturity.

guardian.label: Guardian
guardian.notes: Identification information required for both the Guardian and the ward (if not a minor).

529OnPlatform.label: 529 Account — On Platform
529OnPlatform.notes: Identification information required for all participants on the 529 account.

529OffPlatform.label: 529 Account — Off Platform
529OffPlatform.notes: Identification information required for all participants on the 529 account.

advisoryOnPlatform.label: Advisory — On Platform
advisoryOnPlatform.notes: NetX360+ e-Sign eligible when using Envestnet integration.

offPlatformChangeOfBrokerDealer.label: Off-Platform Change of Broker Dealer
offPlatformChangeOfBrokerDealer.notes: Letter of Authorization (LOA) is acceptable in place of Change of Dealer Authorization.

trust.label: Trust

conditionalDocuments.condition: Required for Testamentary Trust accounts only

trust.cipNotes: Government Issued ID required for all Trustees.

estate.label: Estate
estate.cipNotes: Government Issued ID of Executor/Administrator required. Affidavit of Domicile must be notarized. Not eligible for e-Sign.

llc.label: Limited Liability Corporation (LLC)

cipRequirements.note: ONE of the following entity formation documents required

llc.cipNotes: Government Issued ID required for Controlling Person, Authorized Party, and all Beneficial Owners with 25% or more ownership. Review AML Customer Due Diligence Requirements QRC.

captiveInsurance.label: Captive Insurance

cipRequirements.note: ONE of the following entity formation documents required

captiveInsurance.cipNotes: Government Issued ID required for Controlling Person, Authorized Party, and all Beneficial Owners with 25% or more ownership. Review AML Customer Due Diligence Requirements QRC.

corporation.label: Corporation

cipRequirements.note: ONE of the following entity formation documents required

corporation.cipNotes: Government Issued ID required for Controlling Person, Authorized Party, and all Beneficial Owners with 25% or more ownership. Review AML Customer Due Diligence Requirements QRC.

partnership.label: Partnership

cipRequirements.note: ONE of the following entity formation documents required

partnership.cipNotes: Government Issued ID required for Controlling Person, Authorized Party, and all Beneficial Owners with 25% or more ownership. Review AML Customer Due Diligence Requirements QRC.

nonProfitOrganization.label: Non-Profit Organization and Religious Organization

cipRequirements.note: ONE of the following entity formation documents required

nonProfitOrganization.cipNotes: Government Issued ID required for Controlling Person and Authorized Party. Review AML Customer Due Diligence Requirements QRC.

soleProprietorship.label: Sole Proprietorship

cipRequirements.note: ONE of the following entity formation documents required

soleProprietorship.cipNotes: Government Issued ID required for Controlling Person and Authorized Party. Review AML Customer Due Diligence Requirements QRC.

corporatePensionProfitSharing.label: Corporate Pension / Profit Sharing / Outside Custodian — Qualified Plan
corporatePensionProfitSharing.cipNotes: Government Issued ID required for all individuals with authority/control (e.g., plan Trustee). Executed Plan Document required.

nonQualifiedDeferredComp.label: Non-Qualified Deferred Compensation Plan / 403(b) / 457
nonQualifiedDeferredComp.cipNotes: Government Issued ID required for all individuals with authority/control (e.g., plan Trustee). Review AML Customer Due Diligence Requirements QRC.

individual401kSuperSimplified.label: Individual 401(K) / Super Simplified Money Purchase / Super Simplified Profit Sharing (Ascensus as TPA)
individual401kSuperSimplified.cipNotes: Government Issued ID required for all individuals with authority/control (e.g., plan Trustee).
individual401kSuperSimplified.notes: SPRP required for Advisory accounts only.

thirdPartyCustodianERISA.label: Third Party Custodian ERISA / QRP
thirdPartyCustodianERISA.cipNotes: Government Issued ID required for all individuals with authority/control (e.g., plan Trustee).

advisoryOnPlatformEntity.label: Advisory — On Platform (Entity)
advisoryOnPlatformEntity.notes: NetX360+ e-Sign eligible when using Envestnet integration.

offPlatformChangeOfBrokerDealerEntity.label: Off-Platform Change of Broker Dealer (Entity)
offPlatformChangeOfBrokerDealerEntity.notes: Letter of Authorization (LOA) is acceptable in place of Change of Dealer Authorization.

accountTransfersACAT.label: Account Transfers (ACAT)
accountTransfersACAT.notes: Initiates a full or partial account transfer into Park Avenue Securities from an outside firm. Client Statement not needed for ACAT transfers. Review Transfers resources on GOL.

nonACATTransfer.label: Non-ACAT Transfer (manual / off-platform)
nonACATTransfer.notes: Client Statement required for non-ACAT transfers only.

standingACHInstructions.label: Standing ACH Instructions

conditionalDocuments.condition: Bank documentation may be required at Pershing's discretion

standingACHInstructions.notes: Must be completed before ACH deposit or withdrawal transactions can be initiated.

journalsDifferentTaxIdRegistration.label: Journals to Different Tax ID / Registrations

corestoneCheckingAccounts.label: Corestone Agreement — Checking Accounts
corestoneCheckingAccounts.notes: Allows enhanced cash management features (checks and debit cards) on an account.

margin.label: Margin
margin.notes: Allows the use of margin on an account.

options.label: Options
options.notes: Allows the trading of options in an account.

powerOfAttorney.label: Power of Attorney

options.description: Legal POA document dated within 3 years
Legal POA document older than 3 years, accompanied by POA Affidavit
Pershing's Durable Power of Attorney form signed by Account Owner and POA Agent with Notary

powerOfAttorney.notes: A new POA Affidavit is required every 3 years. Government Issued ID must be uploaded along with required forms.

changeOfRRIAR.label: Change of RR / IAR
changeOfRRIAR.notes: CGBLK only required for single change via edit Profile screen. Bulk updates done through Account Services by ACO do not require CGBLK.

annuityApplication.label: Annuity Application and Supporting Docs
annuityApplication.notes: Refer to Annuity Carrier Electronic Signature Availability resource for e-Sign eligibility by carrier.

requestToExchangeInvestments.label: Request to Exchange Investments (Switch Letters)
requestToExchangeInvestments.notes: Does not go for approval but required to be on file. When scanning, select 'Submit for Review'.
